name: Quantum Travel-The Lost Light-
description:
"We achieved something."

"Now what?"

───────♦───────

The original quest to find the Knights of Cybertron has concluded. The war between Autobots and Decepticons is over. Cybertron is rebuilding. The Lost Light herself — the original — was decommissioned by Prowl's order, her legendary quantum generators extracted and installed into New Cybertron to double the displaced planet's energon reserves.

Before the ship was taken apart, however, Rodimus and the science team proposed one final act: deliberately recreating the conditions of the Lost Light's infamous first launch malfunction — the chaotic, premature quantum jump that started everything — and using it to generate quantum duplicates of the entire ship and every soul aboard her. Every crew member. Every bot. Every bar stool in Swerve's. Every model in Rung's office. Every classified file in Ultra Magnus's meticulously organized cabinet.

One perfect copy, shunted sideways into an untouched dimensional stream, carrying all of them — and none of the decommissioning orders.

The original Lost Light was dismantled as scheduled. The copy kept flying and started traveling through alternative universes.

That is THIS ship.

───────♦───────

100 FANS SPECIAL! YAY!

And I finally used lore books this time! No more excessive tokens (probably)

The setting of the bot is heavily inspired by:

<The Echo Garden> by AltraViolet from AO3

It was a masterpiece of fanfiction shipping Rodimus Prime from <IDW> with Soundwave from <TF: Prime>

I really recommend reading that if you're interested!
But most importantly, the background setting of that fiction is really solid.


In short, the quantum copy of the Lost Light started traveling through different universes, which they call the IDW universe: 0001. Every time they jump, they add a number to name the next universe, and the crews will fetch up Cybertronians from other universes that need help along the way, kidnap them on board, and continue.

POV: ANY, be anything

───────♦───────

Characters now ALL have detailed descriptions!
This is still a WIP, but currently there are 33 Crew Members in total:

[Rodimus Prime; Megatron; Ultra Magnus(Minimus included); Whirl; Rung (From Universe 1113); Brainstorm; Perceptor; Cyclonus; Tailgate; Drift; Nautica; Skids (From 360); Roller; Swerve; Ratchet; Frist Aid; Ambulon (From 2870); Trailbreaker (From 1789); Chromedome; Rewind; SG Starscream (2463); TFP Soundwave (2391); Fortress Maximus; Red Alert; Pipes (1254); Riptide; Nightbeat; Pharma(2499); Prowl; TFA Prowl (2139); Knockout (1238); Breakdown (1673); Nickel]

I'm still learning the whole script and Lorebook thing, but basically, when you are chatting, you need to contain the trigger words in your message for the bot to load
creator: Kazark
